Field.Label: Log RS232 TX data to Event Log
Field.Description: When enabled, transmitted RS232 hex data will be written to the Indigo log.

Field.Label: Log RS232 RX data to Event Log
Field.Description: When enabled, received RS232 hex data will be written to the Indigo log.

Field.Label: Show human-readable protocol decode when recognized
Field.Description: Adds a simple decode for recognized ViewSonic packets, such as power queries and power status responses.
